title: dorycnium pentaphyllum var. humile
intro: Dorycnium pentaphyllum var. humile, also known as low creeping restharrow, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dorycnium pentaphyllum var. humile include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and support overall well-being.
